comment: Great condition and great delivery with care!
Well packaged, punctual delivery, hand written thank you note. Excellent vendor, highly recommend! :)
A+++!! Decade-old card came in perfect MINT condition, exceedingly well-packaged, and lightning-fast. Very much appreciated the handwritten note on the invoice & love doing business with you! :)
bought a 10-cent card and they still packaged it as if it were a 100$ card. wonderful packaging, and fast shipping. lovely seller.
A+++! Older cards all arrived in M/NM condition, exceedingly well-packaged, and lightning-fast. Very much appreciated the handwritten note on the invoice and love doing business with you! :)

A+++!! 5 and 1/2 year-old card arrived in fantastic M/NM condition exactly as expected/described, incredibly well-packaged (sleeved, toploaded, and team-bagged!), and with a lovely handwritten note. This was the very last copy I needed to complete a playset for my binder. Would LOVE to do business again! :)
I was missing cards and the seller reshipped them. Thanks!

Condition as described, arrived safe and within 10 days, trustworthy seller.
